spec_match.rationale: Excellent spec compliance. Direct side-by-side code compare matches the exact W3C behavior constraints of min-content, max-content, max-width and fit-content(cap).

interactive.rationale: Contains dynamic preset buttons, real-time textual custom inputs, and range sliders for both the fit-content cap and the max-width thresholds.

edge_cases.rationale: Very clean. Programmatically measures post-rendered client bounds via requestAnimationFrame and simulates layout behavior flawlessly if the browser's engine lacks native support.

design_system.rationale: Well layout out responsive cards, crisp tabular behavior ticks and crosses, and readable monospace tables.

summary: A flawless, highly complete interactive side-by-side layout comparison contrasting min-content, max-content, max-width, and fit-content(cap) with programmatic width measurement and fallback simulation.
